WELCOME
Nathu Sweets, a name synonymous today with Indian sweets and snacks, traces its humble beginnings to 1939. The operations started out as a small sweet shop in Bengali Market, Delhi in the lush area of central delhi.
ONLINE ORDER
About Us
Our Chef and Staff
Dine In or Take Out
Dine In or Take Out
With years of experience cooking in the finest restaurants, our chef is excited to present their vision to you and all our guests. Our caring and committed staff make sure you have a fantastic experience with us.
ORDER ONLINE
Dine In or Take Out
Dine In or Take Out
Dine In or Take Out
We have worked to package our meals in a way that lets you bring the quality of our meals into your home. We always love to see you in person, but even when we can't we ensure that your dining experience is top notch!
ORDER ONLINE
Seasonal and Local
Dine In or Take Out
Seasonal and Local
We refuse to compromise on quality in our restaurant. That's why we source our fresh ingredients from local farmers' markets. No matter what time of year, you can be sure you're eating the best of the season.
